ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the quarter */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the quarter */,
  "eps_basic" REAL /* Basic earnings per share */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Diluted earnings per share */,
  "cost_of_goods_sold" REAL /* Cost of goods sold for the quarter */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit for the quarter */,
  "accrued_comprehensive_income" REAL /* Accrued comprehensive income */,
  "goodwill" REAL /* Goodwill */,
  "intangibles" REAL /* Intangibles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES users ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheets" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the balance sheet report */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "shareholders_equity" REAL /* Shareholders' equity */,
  "current_assets" REAL /* Current assets */,
  "non_current_assets" REAL /* Non-current assets */,
  "current_liabilities" REAL /* Current liabilities */,
  "non_current_liabilities" REAL /* Non-current liabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES financial_statements ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flows" (
  "cash_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow statement */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the cash flow report */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operating activities */,
  "investing_cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from investing activities */,
  "financing_cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from financing activities */,
  "purchases_of_property_plant_and_equipment" REAL /* Purchases of property, plant, and equipment */,
  "proceeds_from_debt_issuance" REAL /* Proceeds from debt issuance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flows_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES financial_statements ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of financial metrics */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report for metrics */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin percentage */,
  "net_margin" REAL /* Net margin percentage */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio of the company */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES financial_statements ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "affected_row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affected row */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "changed_values" TEXT /* Changed values (JSON formatted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial forecast */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast report */,
  "revenue_forecast" REAL /* Revenue forecast for the quarter */,
  "net_income_forecast" REAL /* Net income forecast for the quarter */,
  "eps_basic_forecast" REAL /* Basic earnings per share forecast */,
  "eps_diluted_forecast" REAL /* Diluted earnings per share forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_forecasts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES financial_statements ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data (JSON formatted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
